## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Idea

What would you like VeilClip to do?

## Why It Helps

Who does this help, and why is it useful?

## Possible Design

If you have a simple idea for the UI or workflow, describe it here.

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Clipboard history
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Favorites
- [ ] Locked Notes
- [ ] Backup
- [ ] Export / Import
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Localization
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Extra Context

Add mockups, examples, or related tools if helpful.
